summary: Comprehensive test of new Seguridad feature (backend + frontend), DaVinci removal, DB collapsibles, WelcomeTour update, animations regression. Backend 11/11 pytest PASS. Frontend all critical flows PASS. Password + protection cleaned up at end (verified GET /api/security/status → password_enabled:false, protection_enabled:false).
critical_code_review_comments: DatabasePage.jsx grew to 1325 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Consider extracting each of the 6 blocks into a separate component file (BackupBlock, ConnBlock, CleanupBlock, UpdatesBlock, OptionsBlock, DangerBlock) to improve maintainability.
AppearancePage.jsx is 2000+ lines from prev iteration — same recommendation still stands.
db-block-toggle-* elements are <div> with onClick — no keyboard/aria-expanded support. Consider using <button> with aria-expanded for a11y and easier automated testing.
test_credentials: N/A - app has no auth. Test password 'test1234' was used and REMOVED at end.
seed_data_creation: Test password + hint created and DELETED. Test reservation TEST_Security_Reg created and DELETED. Test theme TEST_SecReg_Theme created and DELETED. Page protection toggled on then OFF.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 review items PASS: (1) BACKEND security endpoints: GET status initial={password_enabled:false,hint:'',protection_enabled:false}; POST set-password OK; verify wrong→401, verify correct→{valid:true}; POST set-password without current_password when exists→401; PUT protection toggles enabled true/false correctly; POST remove-password OK. (2) GET /api/settings does NOT include app_password_hash (verified in test_08). (3) FRONTEND Seguridad UI: section-toggle-seguridad expands; security-new-password + security-confirm-password + security-hint-input + security-save-password-btn saves → GET status returns password_enabled:true,hint='pista test'; after sessionStorage.clear() + reload → lock-screen appears; wrong pwd shows lock-error-msg='Contraseña incorrecta — inténtalo de nuevo'; lock-show-hint-btn shows 'Tu pistapista test'; correct 'test1234' unlocks and sets sessionStorage.cp_app_unlocked='true'; second reload does NOT prompt. (4) Page protection: page-protection-toggle adds body class 'page-protected'; dispatched contextmenu on H1 → defaultPrevented=True; on <input> → defaultPrevented=False (correct exemption); toggling OFF removes class. (5) Base de Datos: all 6 db-block-toggle-* present; default heights = backup:844(OPEN), conn:577(OPEN), cleanup/updates/options/danger:collapsed; clicking cleanup expands (h=256); refresh button inside conn header keeps conn open (577→577 with stopPropagation); clicking conn header collapses it. (6) DaVinci: ui-mode-davinci element not present; text 'Modo de Diseño Global' NOT in body; searching 'davinci' in appearance-search-input shows 0 visible section toggles. (7) Tutorial: welcome-tour-overlay shows 'Paso 1 de 18' on clean localStorage; tour-skip-btn dismisses and it doesn't reappear. (8) Regression: Dashboard stats-grid + charts-section render; /reservaciones loads OK; /actualizaciones check-updates-btn shows up-to-date-banner (green). (9) Backend regression: /api/reservations GET+POST+DELETE, /api/updates/check, /api/themes CRUD all pass. FINAL cleanup verified: curl /api/security/status → {password_enabled:false,hint:'',protection_enabled:false}.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
